pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.x.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to replace deprecated Springfox for API documentation.
Remove deprecated Springfox dependencies (springfox-boot-starter, springfox-swagger-ui) incompatible with Spring Boot 3.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switched the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replaced apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Added Maven as a runtime dependency since it is no longer included in the base image.
Added libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or build tools on Alpine.
Added Git to the image to support build-time requirements or dokku integration.
Upgraded Node.js installation from version 12 to version 20 using nvm to match modern frontend tooling requirements.
Changed the build process to copy the entire source directory (including git info) and run Maven package inside the container.
Updated the container entrypoint to execute the generated JAR file instead of starting a bash shell.
